entry.title: How Long
entry.summary:
Author: ApplejuiceDay

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,717Chapters: 4/7Kudos: 41

Summary: Stiles has been dumped by Derek for months, and he doesn’t understand why Derek gets so angry sees him getting close to someone else at a bar. -WARNING: Dubious Consent

entry.title: underground
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,378Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: Derek’s claws reach out for Stiles like a lifeline. The hunters hold him back and he writhes and snarls in their grip. Stiles’ face across from him in the forest is a mirror of his own, desperate and haunted and terrified, angry and wild. They reach for each other, but it’s fruitless; they’re too far apart, and the men are dragging Stiles backwards, away from Derek, further and further from him. Derek roars, spit flying everywhere and sharp teeth snapping at the hunters surrounding him, but his red eyes stay glued to his mate. He thrashes, Stiles’ cries and yells echoing in his ears over the sound of his own rapid heartbeat. At last he turns around in the hunters’ grasp, intending to slash their throats out with a swipe of his claws, but a needle plunges into his own neck, and his world fades to black. The last thing he hears is the mournful, harrowed, desperate sound of his own name on Stiles’ lips. The forest goes dark around him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: takane no hana
entry.summary:
Author: kanra_nox

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,745Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: 高嶺の花 /takane no hana/ Japanese (n.) someone or something one desires, but is far away, or unattainable; lit. "flower on a high peak" or "What the fuck?" hissed Stiles, scrunching his nose. "What does that even mean? Is the curse referring to murder?" "Ōkuninushi is deemed as the kami of love and prosperous marriage, while Inari Ōkami is the kami of agriculture. I believe the translation is referring to breaking someone's heart." Oh. Well, shit. or or A Sterek Hanahaki fic with a little twist on the disease

entry.title: O U T S I D E
entry.summary:
Author: eternautumn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,791Chapters: 5/16Kudos: 13

Summary: Derek is an agent working for the FBI and on the trail of an elusive serial killer, though always two steps behind. Stiles is an eccentric starving artist and part-time sleuth that may just be the key to a break in the case. Somewhere outside, they meet in the middle.   A dark AU.

entry.title: By My Side
entry.summary:
Author: HyperDoctor11

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,552Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Genevive Stilinski is no ordinary mundane as she was led to believe her entire life. She learns on her eighteenth birthday that she's half-Shadowhunter and half-Demon, a Warlock. Her mother's secret. All the legends are true. Gen happens to be one of those legends. Genevive doesn't expect her baby cousin, Clary Fray's, own eighteenth birthday to blow up in their faces when Jocelyn goes missing and the two of them are taken to a Shadowhunter Institute. Gen must come to an understanding within herself about who she is and whose side she is on. On thing is for certain. Genevive's life will never go back to the way it was before.

entry.title: The Secret
entry.summary:
Author: Nyx_A

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,132Chapters: 3/8Kudos: 19

Summary: Seems like everyone BUT Stiles is in on a secret involving Stiles and Derek yet no one is willing to help the poor human and let him know. Meanwhile Derek is trying desperately to not show any emotions that might hint at the truth. All of this is going on when the pack is under attack by a strange wolf pack threatening to take over the Hale land.

entry.title: Your Frequency
entry.summary:
Author: PromptedScribe

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,721Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 97

Summary: Derek Hale is a Class Five Sentinel — one of the most powerful in federal service — and he's falling apart. Four years after his former Guide used their bond to crawl inside his head and sell state secrets through his senses, he's sworn off Guides entirely. But the longer he goes without one, the more his senses fragment: zone-outs, feral episodes, walls through which he puts various colleagues. The Bureau of Sentinel-Guide Affairs gives him an ultimatum — accept a new Guide or be locked in a containment facility for everyone's safety. Enter Stiles Stilinski: newly manifested, top of his class, already fired from two field placements for being smarter than his supervisors and incapable of keeping that information to himself. Their compatibility index is ninety-fourth percentile. Their first meeting goes about as well as you'd expect. This is a story about the difference between bonds that are taken and bonds that are chosen. About a man who learned that trust is a weapon, and the loudmouthed, gummy-bear-eating disaster of a Guide who teaches him it can also be a door.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Boyfriend Material
entry.summary:
Author: isthatbloodonhisshirt (wasterella)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,126Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 314

Summary: “You’re back,” he said, sounding as surprised as he looked. “I didn’t think you would be.” “Why not?” Stiles asked, confused and still half-asleep. He yawned as he rubbed both hands across his face again, and then froze at the next words out of Jeremy’s mouth. “I figured you’d spend the weekend with your boyfriend.” His what? “My what?” he asked aloud. “Your boyfriend,” Jeremy said, tilting his head slightly in confusion. “The angry, overprotective dude who came to get you? You could’ve just told us it was your boyfriend you know, you didn’t have to give us the song and dance ‘he’s my dad’s deputy’ routine. I kind of figured out you were lying about that in first year when you moved in with him for the summer.” Stiles stared at him, completely flabbergasted about this entire situation. “What the fuck are you talking about?”

entry.title: The sins at night in Vatican City
entry.summary:
Author: TheDanishWriter2400

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,484Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: When the deacon, Derek Hale comes to pray late at night, trying to atone for impure thoughts, he wasn´t prepared to meet the obssession behind his impure thoughts, or see that person being sin incarnate.What happens when a man of God represses his needs for far too long? And what happens when an Incubus is faced with more than they can chew? Is it the power of God, or desire incarnate that will come out victorious? Or will both go down a path of indescribable heat, and will it end in fire or passion beyond devine measure?

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,638Chapters: 18/40Kudos: 42

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up with Stiles Stilinski as a lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief time where they are in an A/B/O AU and where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much, so you can make your own choices. This story was originally my NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

entry.title: Remember me
entry.summary:
Author: StormyBlack

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,081Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 78

Summary: The other teen raised an inquisitive eyebrow at him when Scott called his name, looking entirely surprised that Scott even knew it. Both of the teenagers looked past Scott's shoulder, where the pack was standing united, trying their best not to overwhelm Stiles but anxiously waiting for him to acknowledge them. Maybe with a hug? It had been a long time. "Do you know these people?" the girl inclined her head and whispered into his ear.Her question earned a casual shrug from Stiles, who whispered back a flat, "No."

entry.title: It Was A Stranger Beneath My Face
entry.summary:
Author: The_Lady_Grey

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,534Chapters: 7/9Kudos: 104

Summary: Unknown caller.Okay. Great.Not like it could be the scum of the earth that he’d been hunting across goddamn Narnia or anything. He knew, Stiles knew that he shouldn’t answer it, but at this point he was a glutton for punishment.“Stilinski speaking,” he said, work voice in place despite the way his chest still heaved and his legs burned post-run. The line was silent for a moment.“Stiles?” The voice was familiar and it seemed shocked that he had picked up his own phone. or An AU where the Nogistune ordeal happens... differently but Stiles is still cast out. Alas, a string of murders have the pack crawling back for help. Shenanigans ensue.

entry.title: [Podfic] devil don’t take a break
entry.summary:
Author: whimsicalmeerkat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 75Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Stiles would like to say he first realized his best friend had been turned into a werewolf because of his keen powers of observation and knowledge of both Scott and the supernatural world. He prefers for his lies to have a purpose though, so he’s forced to admit that he had no idea what had happened until the moment Scott said, “What the fuck, dude, are you wearing a Halloween costume? Why do you have a tail?” So, roughly 30 seconds ago. ~ Scott turns into a werewolf and finds out Stiles is a demon. He doesn’t take it well. The story proceeds from there.Podfic of devil don’t take a break by whimsicalmeerkat.

entry.title: Someone Else's Tupperware
entry.summary:
Author: ModeratelyScathed

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,435Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 119

Summary: The funny thing is, Stiles actually has no idea who just climbed through his window. Doesn't really care, either. All he wants to do is catch a few hours of uninterrupted sleep before the nightmares drag him back to consciousness.Again.Still, he expects some sort of snarky response if it's Derek or Peter. Or maybe the vocal embodiment of Scott's puppy dog eyes if it's his best friend.He doesn't expect several seconds of silence.And he definitely doesn't expect the sudden and unmistakable thump of a body hitting the ground.

entry.title: It just takes time
entry.summary:
Author: Cantfindmy_rattata

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,872Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Derek doesn't do that though he doesn't leave instead he says, ” I understand” Stiles looks at him a little surprised at the openness “After the fire I couldn't sleep… every time I saw them I saw all of them and everytime I always thought it was my fault that I did that I killed them. I will always hold that guilt but i didn't set that fire just like you didn't hurt those people you didn't know what you were doing you were possessed do you understand, this is not your fault Stiles and it's not your burden to carry alone” OrI'm really excited to get to season 3 and know a lot of spoilers😏

entry.title: Only When It's You
entry.summary:
Author: MystikCeleste

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,813Chapters: 6/39Kudos: 41

Summary: A plan that will bring together the Supernatural world of the West Coast and the Shadow World of the East Coast. Two brothers that don't know the other exists. Two groups of warriors fighting the same war on opposite sides of the country. Warriors that should know each other, but don’t. It’s time for them to meet.
